metadata.description: Portable-core harness: deterministic vault-hygiene engines + memory-audit + thin adapters.

plugins.name: neurokeeper
plugins.description: Deterministic Obsidian-vault hygiene engines (tags / frontmatter / taxonomy / link-aware rename / reference-integrity audit) + a deterministic memory-audit + an optional two-lane self-hosted-model handoff. One portable core, runnable as a Claude Code plugin AND a standalone CLI.
